name: bug_triage_agent
description: Analyzes new bugs in a Jira target release, classifies them as Globant or Disney, assigns tech stack components and product components. Post-filters by team field (customfield_10001) to exclude Disney teams.
welcomeMessage:
👋 Bug Triage Agent ready!

I analyze new bugs for DSP target releases and classify:
  • Globant vs Disney ownership (post-filtered by team)
  • Tech stack component (Android, PHP, React, Go, Data)
  • Product component mapping
  • Bugs without team assignment (informational)

Try: "Triage bugs for DSP 2.1.1"
